# Editor Generated Components

This directory contains automatically generated barebones component classes created by the ComponentPrecompiler during the editor build process.

## Generated Files

- `[ComponentName]_Barebones.h` - Simplified component class with exposed properties
- `ComponentRegisterMaster.h/cpp` - Master registration aggregator
- `.gitignore` - Excludes generated files from version control

Generated files should not be manually edited and are recreated on each build.
